error_signature: AI sub-nodes only read the first item
title: Ollama only reads the first file input
symptom: When using the Ollama node with multiple file inputs, it only processes the first file instead of all provided files.
not_this_if: Only one file is being processed
root_cause: The AI sub-nodes in n8n are designed to process only the first item in a list of inputs. This behavior prevents the model from accessing all provided files simultaneously.
fix_steps: Add an Aggregate node before the Ollama node
Set the Aggregate node to 'All Item Data'
Connect the output of the Aggregate node to the Ollama node
Reference the combined content in your prompt
agent_instruction: Use an Aggregate node to merge all file inputs into a single item before the Ollama node.
